name.description: The name of the ssm  parameter

type.description: The type of the parameter. Valid types are String, StringList and SecureString.

tier.description: Parameter tier to assign to the parameter. If not specified, will use the default parameter tier for the region.

allowed_pattern.description: Regular expression used to validate the parameter value.

key_id.description: KMS key ID or ARN for encrypting a SecureString.

tags.description: A map of tags to apply to the resources
